creator: mops@punkt.de
text:
ifconfig bnxt0 up
ifconfig vlan1 create
ifconfig vlan1 vlan 1 vlandev bnxt0
ifconfig vlan1 inet 192.168.0.1/24

Result: no connection on VLAN1, no packets visible if

tcpdump -n -i vlan1


Workaround:

ifconfig bnxt0 promisc

Working as expected.


Kind regards,
Patrick
